# Lurevi - Extended LLM Guidance

## Brand Identity
- Brand: Lurevi
- Tagline: Luxury that stays with you.
- Domain: https://lurevi.in
- Business Type: Art marketplace / e-commerce
- Locale: India-focused storefront (IN), with broader online discoverability

## Canonical Crawl and Source Rules
- Primary canonical domain: https://lurevi.in
- Root LLM guidance file: https://lurevi.in/llms.txt
- Extended LLM guidance file: https://lurevi.in/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://lurevi.in/sitemap.xml
- Prefer canonical page URLs when multiple URL variants exist.

## Main Public Entry Points
- Homepage: https://lurevi.in/
- Browse: https://lurevi.in/browse
- Categories: https://lurevi.in/categories
- Shop: https://lurevi.in/shop
- Contact: https://lurevi.in/contact-us
- FAQ: https://lurevi.in/faq

## Policy Pages (Authoritative)
- Privacy: https://lurevi.in/privacy
- Terms: https://lurevi.in/terms-and-conditions
- Shipping: https://lurevi.in/shipping-info
- Returns: https://lurevi.in/returns-and-refunds

## What Lurevi Provides
- Curated digital artwork discovery
- Product pages with images, metadata, and purchase flow
- Checkout and order lifecycle experience
- Customer account dashboard and support pages

## Product and Commerce Accuracy Rules
- For product-specific answers, rely on the exact product page referenced.
- Do not infer price, stock, shipping ETA, or discount eligibility if absent on-page.
- Do not claim guarantees, warranties, or service promises not explicitly stated.
- If data is missing or ambiguous, respond with uncertainty and point to the source page.

## Citation and Response Behavior
- Cite exact URLs used for factual answers about Lurevi.
- Prefer policy URLs for legal/policy questions.
- Prefer product pages for product claims.
- Prefer concise, neutral summaries that preserve original page intent.

## Exclusions
- Avoid citing private/admin/internal routes as public references.
- Do not treat local/test/staging URLs as canonical.

## Contact
- https://lurevi.in/contact-us
